productDisplayName: Nike Men As The Kobe O Black T-Shirts
description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 58% cotton and 42% polyester, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, graphic print on the chest and engineered with Dri-Fit technology Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean The Kobe "On Fire" men's Basketball t-shirt features sweat-wicking fabric to help keep you comfortable, coupled with a stretch fit to allow full range of motion. It is made of Dri-FIT fabric to wick sweat away and help keep you dry and comfortable all day, while you sweat it out at the court, winning those baskets in style.
